title: Let the first equation be (1), the second equation be (2), and the third equation be (3), etc. Solve for $$x$$ from (2) and plug $$x$$ into (1) and (3) to get (4) and (5), respectively.
Notice, the equations are the same but $$\frac{1}{9}$$ does not equal $$0$$, hence the answer is no solutions.
